meta.title: Kos-y tɩ b maan porze sẽn na yɩl tɩ nebã tõe n paam b sẽn datã

hero.title: Kos-y tɩ b maan porze sẽn na yɩl tɩ nebã tõe n paam b sẽn datã
hero.lead: IATF vaeesda no-rɩkds nins sẽn kẽed ne soog-n-mengã tʋʋm-teedo sẽn yit ratem sẽn yaa takɩ pʋgẽ.
support: Y pa segd n bao n bãng yɛlã fãa ye. Y sã n bãng yellã sẽn yaa to-to wã vẽenega, a sẽn namsd neb ninsã, la a sẽn tar yõodã, y tõe n sɩnga ne rẽ bala.

header.kicker: Zĩis nins b sẽn boond tɩ
header.title: Bao-y sor ning sẽn yaa nana n yɩɩdã

intro: Soayã fãa kẽeda vaeesg a yembr pʋgẽ.

items.label: ẽntɛrnetã zugu
items.body: Sebr ning sẽn be tẽngrã pʋgẽ wã pʋgẽ, y tõe n paama kosg sẽn zems ne y sẽn datã.

items.label: Gʋls-y-yã
items.body: Yãk-y n tool-y-yã {{contact.requestsEmail}}E-mailã no-rɩkds tõe n lebgame tɩ nebã fãa tõe n yã-ba, b sã n vaees-ba la b yiis-ba.

items.label: Sãmb-sãmb ka be ye
items.body: Sã n yaa woto n yaa nana n yɩɩd bɩ y sɩng be. Kosgã ket n kẽeda vaeesg kãng pʋgẽ.

guidance.title: Nand tɩ y tʋm kosgo
paragraphs: IATF tʋʋmda zãma wã pʋga. B tõe n tigma la b yiis-b tɩ yɩ zãma no-tũuds sull ning sẽn boond tɩ "IATF GitHub" siglgẽ wã, ẽtɛrnet kãnga zugu, bɩ b yiibã fãa.
Ra sak-y tɩ b wilg-y b sẽn boond-b to-to, b telefõnnã nimero, b logtoɛɛmbã, bɩ b sẽn tõe n bãng ned ning fãa sẽn tũnugd ne seglsã ye, sã n pa tɩlɛ tɩ y sak tɩ IATF ges rẽ yelle.
IATF yiisda neb nins sẽn pa tar sor n tõe n paam n paam-b tɩ b tõe n sõs ne-ba, nand tɩ b yiis b kosgã kibayã.

review.title: Gʋls-y sẽn gũud-y to-to
paragraphs: Y sã n kos woto, pa rat n yeel tɩ b na n sakame ye.
IATF vaeesda kosg nins sẽn kẽed ne tʋʋmda zemsgo, tʋʋma maanego, b yõodã, la tʋʋmdã sã n segd n zĩnda zãma wã bĩngr zĩigẽ.
B tõe n tõdga kosg kẽere, n kaoos-a bɩ n toeeme, tɩ b yaool n sak n deeg-a.

fields.name: Sõng-y-yã-a
fields.label: B sẽn dat n tũ sor ning n tɩ seg taabã
fields.helper: Wãn-wãn la b segd n maan vaeesg n paase?

fields.name: Y sẽn tõe n maan to-to n paam-a
fields.label: Sebr ning b sẽn tõe n tɩ sõs ne-yã
fields.helper: E-mail bɩ Discord sẽn na n sõng-y tɩ y bãng y sẽn tõe n maan to-to.

fields.name: buud-gomde
fields.label: Gʋlsgo
fields.helper: Y sẽn dat ne buud-gomdã, sã n yaa tɩlɛ.

fields.name: zu-loeese
fields.label: Yaa zu-loɛɛg bʋg la y rat n welg-yã?
fields.helper: Wilg-y bũmb ning sẽn gɩdgd-a wã ne gom-vɩɩd sẽn yaa vẽenega.

fields.name: Neb nins yell b sẽn gomã
fields.label: Yaa ãnd dãmb yell la b gomda?
fields.helper: Yaa ãnda la woto na n sõng-yã?

fields.name: extraBãngr-goama
fields.label: Yɛl a taab sẽn tõe n sõng-do
fields.helper: Togs-y bũmb a to sẽn tõe n sõng tɩ y bãng y sẽn datã võore. Wala makre, bũmb ning sẽn kɩt t'a tar yõodã, makr dãmba, vɛrse-rãmba, porze-rãmb sẽn pa sõma, wall wakat ning y sẽn segd n maan dẽ wã.

fields.name: OpenSourceConsent
fields.label: Y sũur nooma y sẽn tõe n paam n tʋm ne b sẽn yiisd b sɛbã to-to wã bɩ?
fields.helper: Tʋʋm nins b sẽn sak n deegã yaa IATF taoor dãmb sɛba.
options: M ket n pa mi ye

header.title: D sẽn na n sak n deeg-b to-to

items: a zãma wã bĩngr sẽn be IATF GitHub siglgẽ wã
yaa inɛgnɛɛr ning b sẽn yãk t'a na n ges tʋʋmdã yelle
a copyleft lisãnsã sẽn kẽed ne koodã la porze wã teedã wɛɛngẽ
zãma wã zãab sẽn kẽed ne sɛbã b sẽn bĩngã pʋgẽ
A IATF web-rɩtɛɛrã pʋgẽ, b gʋls-a-la roog pʋga

header.title: Yaa kosg sẽn yaa koɛɛg la sẽn yaa vẽenega bal n sek sẽn na yɩl n sɩng

paragraphs: Y sã n dat tɩ b sõng-y tɩ y tõe n paam n kẽ, la y sã n tagsdẽ tɩ y segd n lebga nin-buiidã fãa tʋʋmde, bɩ y tʋm-d-la seb-kãngã.
